templates.name: Bug Report Acknowledgment
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

Thank you for reporting this issue. I've logged it as ticket #{ticket_id} with priority {priority}.

Our engineering team will investigate within our SLA:
- P0 (service down): 1-hour response
- P1 (major feature broken): 4-hour response
- P2 (minor issues): 48-hour response

I'll keep you updated on progress via this thread.

Best regards,
Support Team
